nasb.text: He brought the letter to the king of Israel, saying, “And now as this letter comes to you, behold, I have sent Naaman my servant to you, that you may cure him of his leprosy.”

esv.text: And he brought the letter to the king of Israel, which read, “When this letter reaches you, know that I have sent to you Naaman my servant, that you may cure him of his leprosy.”

cnv.text: 他把信帶到以色列王那裡，信上說：“這信既已達到你那裡，你看見我差去見你的臣僕乃縵，你就要醫好他的痲風。”

ccb.text: 他带给以色列王的信上写着：“谨以此信介绍我的臣仆乃缦到你那里，你要医好他的麻风病。”
